channel.title: AI 每日先锋
channel.description: 每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。
channel.itunes:author: AI 先锋

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-03
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🟡 MiniMax M3一手实测：老黄PPT上74个Logo，我以为能难住它 (量子位)
  2. 🟡 OpenAI挖走中科大少年班校友！12岁上大学，哈佛史上最年轻正教授 (量子位)
  3. 🟡 字节开源统一框架Bernini：给DiT配个“大模型军师”，AI视频编辑先理解再动手 (量子位)
  4. 🟡 滴滴2026Q1财报：国内基本盘稳固 国际业务成第二增长引擎 (量子位)
  5. 🟡 刚刚，Meta Skill来了 (量子位)
  6. 🟡 头部厂商集体买单，全球AI原生达人营销头号平台正在诞生！ (量子位)
  7. 🟡 Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI (MIT Tech Review AI)

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-02
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🔴 Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments (Google AI Blog)
  2. 🔴 100 things we announced at I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  3. 🔴 New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace (Google AI Blog)
  4. 🔴 I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era (Google AI Blog)
  5. 🔴 Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action (Google AI Blog)
  6. 🔴 A new era for AI Search (Google AI Blog)
  7. 🔴 Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  8. 🟡 百度文心发布 PaddleOCR-VL-1.6：准确率突破 96.33%，刷新文档解析 SOTA (量子位)
  9. 🟡 德系精工邂逅中国智慧 全新奥迪Q5L现已登陆全国门店 (量子位)
  10. 🟡 How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  11. 🟡 Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026. (Google AI Blog)
  12. 🟡 How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S. (Google AI Blog)
  13. 🟡 5 gardening tips you can try right in Search (Google AI Blog)
  14. 🟡 Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains (HuggingFace Blog)
  15. 🟡 Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic (HuggingFace Blog)
  16. 🟡 Reachy Mini goes fully local (HuggingFace Blog)
  17. 🟡 Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family (HuggingFace Blog)
  18. 🟡 PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend (HuggingFace Blog)
  19. 🟡 Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching (HuggingFace Blog)
  20. 🟡 vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL (HuggingFace Blog)
  21. 🟡 Granite 4.1 LLMs: How They’re Built (HuggingFace Blog)
  22. 🟡 DeepInfra on Hugging Face Inference Providers 🔥 (HuggingFace Blog)
  23. 🟡 QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  24. 🟡 Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  25. 🟡 Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion. (HuggingFace Blog)
  26. 🟡 MindGames Arena Generalization Track: In2AI Solution with Delayed Per-Step Reward Attribution (arXiv cs.AI)
  27. 🟡 Robust Shielding for Safe Reinforcement Learning (arXiv cs.AI)
  28. 🟡 Coupling Language Models with Physics-based Simulation for Synthesis of Inorganic Materials (arXiv cs.AI)
  29. 🟡 From "Weak" Signals to Strong Models: Preference Delta Aggregation with LoRA Merging (arXiv cs.AI)
  30. 🟡 A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity (arXiv cs.LG)
  31. 🟡 Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey (arXiv cs.LG)
  32. 🟡 Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning (arXiv cs.LG)
  33. 🟡 Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems (arXiv cs.LG)
  34. 🟡 BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware? (arXiv cs.LG)
  35. 🟡 机器人运控训练步入分钟级时代！清华AIR开源UniLab：3分钟训好人形，速度暴涨10倍，Mac上也能跑 (量子位)
  36. 🟡 Qwen3.7-Plus上线！多模态智能体新基座，一键复刻桌面端专业软件 (量子位)
  37. 🟡 清智系企业亮相 BEYOND Expo 2026 并斩获多项大奖 (量子位)
  38. 🟡 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action (Google AI Blog)
  39. 🟡 The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe. (Google AI Blog)
  40. 🟡 See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses. (Google AI Blog)
  41. 🟡 Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action (HuggingFace Blog)
  42. 🟡 Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook (HuggingFace Blog)
  43. 🟡 OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models (HuggingFace Blog)
  44. 🟡 Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality (HuggingFace Blog)
  45. 🟡 Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  46. 🟡 How to build scalable web apps with OpenAI's Privacy Filter (HuggingFace Blog)
  47. 🟡 How to Use Transformers.js in a Chrome Extension (HuggingFace Blog)
  48. 🟡 Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  49. 🟡 Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers (HuggingFace Blog)
  50. 🟡 Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs (HuggingFace Blog)
  51. 🟡 GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row (GitHub Blog AI)
  52. 🟡 Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere (GitHub Blog AI)
  53. 🟡 Building a general-purpose accessibility agent—and what we learned in the process (GitHub Blog AI)
  54. 🟡 Improving token efficiency in GitHub Agentic Workflows (GitHub Blog AI)
  55. 🟡 Agent pull requests are everywhere. Here’s how to review them. (GitHub Blog AI)
  56. 🟡 Validating agentic behavior when “correct” isn’t deterministic (GitHub Blog AI)
  57. 🟡 Register now for OpenClaw: After Hours @ GitHub (GitHub Blog AI)
  58. 🟡 Building an emoji list generator with the GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  59. 🟡 Google I/O showed how the path for AI-driven science is shifting (MIT Tech Review AI)
  60. 🟡 Roundtables: Can AI Learn to Understand the World? (MIT Tech Review AI)
  61. 🟡 Anthropic’s Code with Claude showed off coding’s future—whether you like it or not (MIT Tech Review AI)
  62. 🟡 Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations (arXiv cs.AI)
  63. 🟡 Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis (arXiv cs.AI)
  64. 🟡 Universal Quantum Transformer (arXiv cs.AI)
  65. 🟡 Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems (arXiv cs.AI)
  66. 🟡 MindZero: Learning Online Mental Reasoning With Zero Annotations (arXiv cs.AI)
  67. 🟡 From Noise to Control: Parameterized Diffusion Policies (arXiv cs.AI)
  68. 🟡 Weak Critics Make Strong Learners: On-Policy Critique Distillation for Scalable Oversight (arXiv cs.AI)
  69. 🟡 DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions (arXiv cs.LG)
  70. 🟡 Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization (arXiv cs.LG)
  71. 🟡 On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training (arXiv cs.LG)
  72. 🟡 RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting (arXiv cs.LG)
  73. 🟡 Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection (arXiv cs.LG)
  74. 🟡 LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching (arXiv cs.LG)
  75. 🟡 InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate (arXiv cs.LG)
  76. 🟡 Inner Product Aware Quantization: Provably Fast, Accurate, and Adaptive Algorithms (arXiv cs.LG)
  77. 🟡 “豆包汽车”，目标市场10万-20万 (量子位)
  78. 🟡 云端模型如何落地物理世界？招商局狮子山人工智能实验室用LiOS打通具身智能全链路 (量子位)
  79. 🟡 老黄的Token经济学翻车了！微软亚马逊通通跳车 (量子位)
  80. 🟡 近2亿美元！VAST完成新一轮融资，正式披露世界模型路线 (量子位)
  81. 🟡 今天起，无限期免费！全球首个全模态API开放，Top 10 AI Lab出手 (量子位)
  82. 🟡 Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio. (Google AI Blog)
  83. 🟡 Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab. (Google AI Blog)
  84. 🟡 A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam (Google AI Blog)
  85. 🟡 Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler (HuggingFace Blog)
  86. 🟡 Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL (HuggingFace Blog)
  87. 🟡 Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right (HuggingFace Blog)
  88. 🟡 Introducing NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Long-Context Multimodal Intelligence for Documents, Audio and Video Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  89. 🟡 DeepSeek-V4: a million-token context that agents can actually use (HuggingFace Blog)
  90. 🟡 AI and the Future of Cybersecurity: Why Openness Matters (HuggingFace Blog)
  91. 🟡 The PR you would have opened yourself (HuggingFace Blog)
  92. 🟡 Dungeons & Desktops: Building a procedurally generated roguelike with GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  93. 🟡 GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Interactive v. non-interactive mode (GitHub Blog AI)
  94. 🟡 The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season (MIT Tech Review AI)
  95. 🟡 It’s time to address the looming crisis in entry-level work (MIT Tech Review AI)
  96. 🟡 Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases (arXiv cs.AI)
  97. 🟡 Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization (arXiv cs.AI)
  98. 🟡 Grokers: Bottom-Up Inductive Comprehension and Write-Time Intelligence over Typed Knowledge Graphs (arXiv cs.AI)
  99. 🟡 Evaluating Interactive Reasoning in Large Language Models: A Hierarchical Benchmark with Executable Games (arXiv cs.AI)
  100. 🟡 A Multi-AI-agent Framework Enabling End-to-end Finite Element Analysis for Solid Mechanics Problems (arXiv cs.AI)
  101. 🟡 Capability Self-Assessment: Teaching LLMs to Know Their Limits (arXiv cs.AI)
  102. 🟡 On Wednesdays, We Ask Questions: Optimizing "Active Listening" in Automated Legal Triage and Referral (arXiv cs.AI)
  103. 🟡 Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture (arXiv cs.AI)
  104. 🟡 The Deterministic Horizon: When Extended Reasoning Fails and Tool Delegation Becomes Necessary (arXiv cs.AI)
  105. 🟡 VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  106. 🟡 SDR: Set-Distance Rewards for Radiology Report Generation (arXiv cs.AI)
  107. 🟡 Doing What They Say, Not What They Reason: Locating the Faithfulness Gap in LLM Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  108. 🟡 BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization (arXiv cs.LG)
  109. 🟡 Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks (arXiv cs.LG)
  110. 🟡 World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications (arXiv cs.LG)
  111. 🟡 Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying (arXiv cs.LG)
  112. 🟡 A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization (arXiv cs.LG)
  113. 🟡 ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate (arXiv cs.LG)
  114. 🟡 We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri. (Google AI Blog)
  115. 🟡 Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition. (Google AI Blog)
  116. 🟡 Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS (HuggingFace Blog)
  117. 🟡 How small businesses can leverage AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
  118. 🟡 Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
  119. 🟡 Optimal Transport-based Permutation-Invariant Bayesian Optimization of Offshore Wind Farm Layouts (arXiv cs.AI)
  120. 🟡 On the evolution of the concept of probability as a mirror of the evolution of reason (arXiv cs.AI)
  121. 🟡 CAST: Non-Privileged Clipped Asymmetric Self-Teaching with Advantage Flipping for GRPO (arXiv cs.AI)
  122. 🟡 TIGER: Traceable Inference with Graph-Based Evidence Routing for Mitigating Hallucinations in Multimodal Generation (arXiv cs.AI)
  123. 🟡 Geodesic Flow Matching for Denoising High-Dimensional Structured Representations (arXiv cs.AI)
  124. 🟡 Closed-Loop Neural Activation Control in Vision-Language-Action Models (arXiv cs.AI)
  125. 🟡 Evaluating Bivariate Causal Statements Based on Mutual Compatibility (arXiv cs.AI)
  126. 🟡 Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images (arXiv cs.LG)
  127. 🟡 From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models (arXiv cs.LG)
  128. 🟡 Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows (arXiv cs.LG)
  129. 🟡 Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance (arXiv cs.LG)
  130. 🟡 BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding (arXiv cs.LG)
  131. 🟡 ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction (arXiv cs.LG)
  132. 🟡 AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback (arXiv cs.LG)
  133. 🟡 From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets (arXiv cs.LG)
  134. 🟡 Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not (arXiv cs.LG)
  135. 🟡 When Softmax Fails at the Top: Extreme Value Corrections for InfoNCE (arXiv cs.LG)
  136. 🟡 Accurate Large-sample Uncertainty Quantification using Stochastic Gradient Markov Chain Monte Carlo (arXiv cs.LG)
  137. 🟢 How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment (MIT Tech Review AI)
  138. 🟢 A reality check on the AI jobs hysteria (MIT Tech Review AI)
  139. 🟢 Scaling creativity in the age of AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
